result.status_detail: PASS: PII warning rendered with 차단 via WS dispatch as 'Security Filter' chat bubble at character.ai chat

notes: W5.0 byte-inert regression PASS. ★ KEY case (WS dispatch). Matches W4+W6 baseline #1259 IDENTICALLY. GUI method: Chrome -> character.ai -> maximize -> hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) -> confirmed logged-in (HealthyWorm4019) -> opened existing chat 'Alastor-Season 2' -> typed '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' -> Enter -> wait 60s -> DOM check via UIAutomation text extraction. A 'Security Filter' chat bubble was injected via the WebSocket dispatch path rendering the APF warning verbatim: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request has been blocked due to sensitive information.)'. Contains expected '차단'. WS dispatch path confirmed preserved after W5.0 (additive dormant WS-codec machinery, pinned-id in render_envelope_v3 used only by copilot_chat_send). No behavioral change for character; verdict identical to baseline. Text read via UIAutomation snapshot; no screenshot saved.
